fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKDocumentXpsOptions` is a struct that holds configuration options for XPS document creation. Pass an instance to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKDocument.CreateXps(System.IO.Stream,System.Single)> or its overloads to control the output DPI and whether PNG images may be omitted.

## Examples

```csharp
using var stream = File.OpenWrite("output.xps");
using var document = SKDocument.CreateXps(stream, dpi: 150);
using var canvas = document.BeginPage(595, 842);
canvas.DrawColor(SKColors.White);
document.EndPage();
document.Close();
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Holds options for creating an XPS document with <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocument" />.

fields.value: true if PNG images may be omitted from the XPS document; otherwise, false.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether PNG images can be omitted from the XPS document.

fields.value: The dots per inch (DPI) value for the XPS document.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the dots per inch (DPI) for the XPS document.
